PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-28-2011 Continued To Apr-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Geraldine Spurgeon in Propria Persona.

Ms. Spurgeon stated that the Attorney's office does not have her Father's original will, that she did not the will she submitted was a copy and that it was the only one she has. The Court finds that the submitted will in not an original. The Court informed Ms. Spurgeon that she needs to file an Amended Petition for Probate of A Lost Will and urged her to hire Counsel. The matter was continued to April 25, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of filing of the amended petition.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2011 Continued To Mar-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
